Package org.apache.juneau.rest.client

Interface HttpTransport

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, Closeable
All Known Implementing Classes:
ApacheHc45Transport, ApacheHc5Transport, JavaHttpTransport, JettyHttpTransport, MockHttpTransport, OkHttpTransport
public interface HttpTransport extends Closeable
SPI for pluggable HTTP transports.

An HttpTransport is responsible for executing a fully-resolved TransportRequest and returning a TransportResponse. Implementations include:

  • ApacheHc45Transport (module juneau-rest-client-apache-httpclient-45)
  • ApacheHc5Transport (module juneau-rest-client-apache-httpclient-50)
  • JavaHttpTransport (module juneau-rest-client-java-httpclient)
  • OkHttpTransport (module juneau-rest-client-okhttp)
  • JettyHttpTransport (module juneau-rest-client-jetty)
  • MockHttpTransport (module juneau-rest-mock)

Implementations are discovered automatically via HttpTransportProvider using ServiceLoader, or set explicitly via RestClient.Builder#transport(HttpTransport).

Beta — API subject to change: This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack (org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the next major Juneau release (and possibly earlier).

See Also:
  • juneau-ng REST client
Since:
9.2.1

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    close()
    Releases resources held by this transport (connection pools, threads, etc.).
    TransportResponse
    execute(TransportRequest request)
    Executes the given request and returns the response.

  • Method Details

    • execute

      TransportResponse execute(TransportRequest request) throws TransportException
      Executes the given request and returns the response.

      The caller is responsible for closing the returned TransportResponse after consuming the body.

      Parameters:
      request - The fully-resolved request. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      The response. Never null.
      Throws:
      TransportException - If a network-level error occurs.

    • close

      default void close() throws IOException
      Releases resources held by this transport (connection pools, threads, etc.).

      The default implementation is a no-op.

      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Specified by:
      close in interface Closeable
      Throws:
      IOException
